club.name: Hitchin Running Club
club.tagline: A friendly, all-pace running club based in Hitchin. Three sessions a week, every distance from first 5K to marathon PB, and a club that turns up for each other — rain, shine, or thick winter fog.

sessions.title: Intervals
sessions.description: New for this year — structured speedwork at the track, built to make race pace feel comfortable.
sessions.meet: New location weekly (check Facebook/Spond for confirmation)

sessions.title: Beginners & Club Run
sessions.description: In summer this heads out into local countryside, in winter it stays around town. We aim to cover around 10km as a club run.

sessions.title: Club Run
sessions.description: Typically cross country with a 10km distance as the target.

membership.description: Membership includes various running events, mid-week leagues, and a number of non-running socials each year such as a summer BBQ and Christmas do.
membership.note: Sign up via Facebook to say hello, then come along to your first session at St Mary's car park.

joinSteps.title: Sign up via Facebook
joinSteps.description: Our Facebook page is the best place to say hello and ask any questions before your first run.

joinSteps.title: Come along to your first session
joinSteps.description: Join us at St Mary's car park, Wednesday or Sunday. No minimum pace, no pressure.

joinSteps.title: Join the club on Spond
joinSteps.description: Once you're part of the club, Spond is how we publish running events and gather feedback.

links._spondNote: Replace the # above with the club's actual Spond group URL.

contact.location: St Mary's car park, Hitchin, Hertfordshire, SG5 1AB
contact.trackLocation: Ridlins Athletic Track, Stevenage (monthly club trip)

events.description: We run a number of events under the banner of Hitchin Hares, including the Herts Winter Cross Country League and the Summer Mid-Week League. We're also linked with Burnt Hare, who bring great running events to Hitchin and the surrounding Hertfordshire countryside.
